items.placeName: Đảo Hải Sản | Seafood Restaurant · 해산물 · Рестораны Phú Quốc

facebook.caption: POV: you ducked into a random alley off Đ. Trần Phú and found Đảo Hải Sản. 4.7 stars. 1,335 reviews. $15-30 a head for a full seafood spread. Fresh off the boat, grilled right in front of you. This is the kind of place you stumble into and immediately text everyone back home about. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the grill fire up at Đảo Hải Sản. Alley spot. 4.7 stars. $15-30 for a seafood feast in Phu Quoc. Your dinner plans just changed.

video_script.hook: Took a wrong turn. Found this.

facebook.caption:
POV: you're on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo and the smell of fresh bread stops you mid-step.

O BON PAIN-FRENCH BAKERY. A proper French bakery on Phu Quoc. 4.3 stars across 356 reviews. The kind of place that fixes a slow morning fast.

Croissants, pastries, real coffee. Before the beach. Before anything.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.

items.placeName: TUNG Cake and Tea - Thu Hiền Bakery

facebook.caption: POV: you're walking Nguyễn Trung Trực and everyone else keeps moving. You stop. TUNG Cake and Tea - Thu Hiền Bakery at number 120 is right there. Pastries, tea, 4.5 stars from real locals. Not a resort café. Not a tourist trap. Just a proper little bakery doing its thing on a Phu Quoc street corner. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Walked straight past. Doubled back. 4.5 stars at TUNG Cake and Tea - Thu Hiền Bakery on Nguyễn Trung Trực. Pastries in hand in under 2 minutes. This is how you eat in Phu Quoc.

facebook.caption:
Tourists keep walking past this bakery. Locals don't.

Tiệm Bánh Kem Phú Quốc - PP Bakery on Đ. Trần Phú is rated 4.9 stars. That number on a bakery in Phu Quoc is rare. Fresh cream cakes, local prices, zero tourist markup.

If your hotel breakfast isn't doing it for you, this is the fix. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.

facebook.caption: Coffee, pastries, and a proper sit-down at MIX BAKERY COFFEE & TEA, all under $15. In Phu Quoc. Yes, that's the $$ bracket doing real work. 4.5 stars across 602 reviews means this isn't a fluke. It's the kind of cafe you block two hours for, not two minutes. Find it at 156 Đ. 30 Tháng 4, Phú Quốc. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.

items.placeName: 할로망고 푸꾸옥. HALO MANGO Phu Quoc

facebook.caption:
POV: you're walking Đường Trần Phú and mango desserts stop you cold.

HALO MANGO Phu Quoc. 4.9 stars. 305 reviews. That score on a dessert shop is basically a flex.

Fresh mango everything. The kind of place you pop in for one thing and stay for three more. Số 122, Khu Phố 7, right in Dương Đông town.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Mango desserts stacked at HALO MANGO Phu Quoc. 4.9 stars and 305 people aren't lying. Số 122 Đường Trần Phú, Dương Đông. Don't walk past this one.

facebook.caption:
4.9 stars. 99 reviews. Inside a Venice-themed street in Phú Quốc.

Cafe Juliet & Pastries sits in Sunset Town and the photos alone will make you reroute your whole day. Coffee, pastries, and architecture that looks nothing like the rest of the island.

If you're already heading to Sunset Town for the views, add 30 minutes here. You'll thank yourself.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
